# Minimalist Design Principles

"Less is more": reduce visual noise and let typography + spacing lead.

## Core Concepts
- Whitespace is intentional and directional
- Typography carries hierarchy and tone
- Use a neutral base and one accent color
- Remove non-essential borders/effects

## Tailwind Implementation Example
```html
<section class="max-w-2xl mx-auto py-20 px-6">
  <h1 class="text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight mb-8">Elegance in Simplicity.</h1>
  <p class="text-xl text-zinc-600 leading-relaxed">Design is how it works.</p>
</section>
```

## Usage Guidance
- Prefer simple grids/single-column layouts
- Use `zinc` or `slate` scales
- Keep contrast high for readability
